texts.zh-CN: 本人格报告仅用于自我了解与教育参考，不构成医学或精神健康诊断，也不能替代专业帮助。如你处于心理困扰，请及时寻求专业帮助。
texts.en: This personality report is for self-reflection and education only. It is not a medical or psychiatric diagnosis, and does not replace professional care. If you are in distress, seek professional support.

zh-CN: 不构成医学或精神健康诊断
en: not a medical or psychiatric diagnosis
